what_fde_does.title: Embed
what_fde_does.body: Our FDEs work inside your team's tools, repos, and standups. They're not consultants on a Zoom — they're shipping with your engineers from day one.

what_fde_does.title: Build
what_fde_does.body: Production code, not slideware. FDEs leave behind running systems, tested, deployed, owned by your team.

what_fde_does.title: Transfer
what_fde_does.body: Every engagement ends with knowledge transfer. We document, pair, and review until your team can extend the work without us.

what_fde_does.title: Certify
what_fde_does.body: Every FDE on our bench carries credentials from at least one major vendor ecosystem. You're hiring verifiable skill, not just a résumé.

partnerships.name: Anthropic
partnerships.blurb_announceable: Claude Partner Network member. Our architects hold Claude Certified Architect Foundations (CCAF) and ship production Claude integrations.
partnerships.blurb_pre_announce: Our team is training through Anthropic Academy and is on the path to Claude Certified Architect Foundations (CCAF) certification.

training_tracks.name: Palantir Forward Deployed Engineer
training_tracks.blurb: We train candidates against the Palantir FDE archetype: ontology design, Foundry and AIP fluency, and customer-embedded delivery practices.
training_tracks.disclaimer: Westley is not a Palantir partner. This track prepares candidates for the Palantir FDE role pattern.

certifications.name: Claude Certified Architect Foundations
certifications.blurb: Anthropic's foundational architect certification covering Claude API design patterns, evaluation, safety, and enterprise integration.

certifications.name: AWS Solutions Architect Pro
certifications.blurb: Senior-level AWS architecture certification covering multi-account, multi-region, and cost-optimized design.

certifications.name: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
certifications.blurb: Azure expert architect credential covering compute, networking, storage, and security at scale.

certifications.name: GCP Professional Cloud Architect
certifications.blurb: Google Cloud's professional architect certification covering design, planning, and operations on GCP.

certifications.name: Databricks Data Engineer Professional
certifications.blurb: Databricks' professional certification for production data engineering on the Lakehouse platform.

engagement_models.title: Staff augmentation
engagement_models.body: An FDE joins your team full-time for the engagement, billed weekly. You direct the work; we handle the talent.
engagement_models.fit: Best when you have a clear roadmap but need senior capacity now.

engagement_models.title: Fixed-scope project
engagement_models.body: We scope a defined deliverable — a Claude integration, a data pipeline, an MLOps stack — and ship it on a fixed bid.
engagement_models.fit: Best when the outcome is clear but the path is uncertain.

engagement_models.title: Direct-hire placement
engagement_models.body: We source, vet, and present FDE candidates for your team. You employ them directly; we charge a placement fee.
engagement_models.fit: Best when you want long-term ownership and headcount.

faq.q: How quickly can you put an FDE on-site?
faq.a: For staff augmentation, typically two to three weeks from signed engagement to first day. Fixed-scope projects begin once scope is locked, usually inside a week. Direct-hire placement runs 30–60 days end to end.

Staff augmentation: a weekly rate based on FDE seniority. Fixed-scope project: a fixed bid based on scope and risk. Direct-hire placement: a one-time fee based on first-year compensation. Specifics in the discovery call.
All engagements operate under mutual NDA. IP for fixed-scope and staff-augmentation work transfers to the client on payment. Direct-hire candidates own their own IP, of course.
Every FDE on our bench holds at least one major-vendor certification, has shipped production code, and has been interviewed by our delivery leads. We don't put generalists in front of clients.

faq.q: What if there's a mismatch in the first weeks?
faq.a: We replace the FDE inside 10 business days, at no additional cost. Mismatches are usually a signal we missed something in scoping; the replacement comes with a recalibrated brief.
Primarily US-based engineers, available for remote engagement worldwide and on-site work in North America. EMEA and APAC coverage growing through 2026.

faq.q: Can we trial an FDE before a full engagement?
faq.a: Yes. We offer a two-week trial against a defined task; if you don't want to continue, you owe the two weeks and nothing more.

faq.q: What happens at the end of an engagement?
faq.a: A documented handoff: code reviewed, systems documented, a transition session with your team, and 30 days of post-engagement availability for questions.
